---
title: "Contact"
description: "How to get in touch."
toc: false
---

I'm happy to hear from collaborators, students, and anyone interested in PINNs
for fluid dynamics or medical imaging.

## Email

[emmanuelhackman825@gmail.com](mailto:emmanuelhackman825@gmail.com)

## Affiliation

Department of Mathematics
University of Southern Mississippi
Hattiesburg, MS

## Online

- **GitHub** — [github.com/Hachero98](https://github.com/Hachero98)
- **ORCID** — *(link coming soon)*
- **Google Scholar** — *(link coming soon)*

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
The fastest way to reach me is email. I usually respond within a few days.
:::
